title: Demote Python codegen closeout after clarified #892 intent

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Correct the #892 Python generated CLI closeout after the clarified architecture shows the previous full-completion claim was too narrow.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Do not claim full Python generated CLI completion while generic deterministic behavior remains in module-local Python runtime code instead of codegen-owned primitive executors. Keep TypeScript, Bash, PowerShell, and broad primitive migration implementation out of this corrective PR.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Demote completion state, reopen/reroute issue evidence, update tests and PR wording, and route the remaining work back to #892.
canonical_core.escalate_when: A better-looking fix changes the requested outcome, owned surface, time horizon, or meaningful validation story.
canonical_core.next_action: Demote the canonical completion and planning closeout claims, then validate static proof and planning health.
proof_expectations: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
